translations.### AirPods 2 開箱及上手體驗心得 (雷射鐫刻版)\n\n: ### AirPods 2 Unboxing and First Impressions (Laser Engraved Edition)
translations.### ⚠️不孝商人現在更猖獗了，把盜版用接近正版的價格賣⚠\n\n: ### ⚠️Unethical sellers are now more rampant, selling counterfeit products at prices close to the genuine ones⚠
translations.### 其他有趣的開箱及體驗影片\n\n: ### Other Interesting Unboxing and Experience Videos
translations.### 想知道Apple Watch Series 6 的上手體驗嗎？\n\n: ### Want to know the hands-on experience with Apple Watch Series 6?
translations.### 挑選，無線還是有線版本？\n\n: ### Choosing Between Wireless or Wired Version?
translations.#### [Apple Watch Series 6 開箱＆使用兩年體驗心得 &: #### [Apple Watch Series 6 Unboxing & Two-Year Experience >>> Click Here](../eab0e984043/)
translations.#### [[最新] Apple Watch Series 6 開箱＆使用兩年體: #### [[Latest] Apple Watch Series 6 Unboxing & 2-Year Usage Experience >>> Click Here](../eab0e984043/)
translations.#### 亦或是1代當2代賣？\n\n: #### Or selling the 1st generation as the 2nd generation?
translations.#### 再來是盒子內部防塵貼：\n\n: #### Next is the dust-proof sticker inside the box:
translations.**Apple Watch 查看電量方法：**\n\n: **How to Check Battery Level on Apple Watch:**
translations.**Hey Siri 的部分** ，起初也覺得很雞肋，因為我有手錶也能遠距離He:
**Hey Siri feature**, at first, seemed unnecessary since I can use Hey Siri remotely with my watch; but after trying it, as mentioned earlier, it’s all about the "detail experience." AirPods takes Hey Siri to the next level—you don’t even need to raise your hand to activate it. Just say Hey Siri, and it works, truly making Siri feel omnipresent.  
A common scenario is when you’re tidying up and both hands are full; this feature becomes very convenient!  
Also, you can **ask Siri to adjust the volume**: "Hey Siri! Turn it up," "Hey Siri! Set the volume to 75%."
translations.**所以最終我選擇了有線版的AirPods 2。**\n\n: **So in the end, I chose the wired charging version of AirPods 2.**
translations.**用小工具查看電量方法：**\n\n: **How to Check Battery Level with a Widget:**
translations.**網友提問：1代與2代保護套是否能共用？**\n\n: **User Question: Can the cases for 1st and 2nd generation be used interchangeably?**
translations.**通話品質部分** 也是同樣驚艷，除了基本的通話品質穩定之外，收音效果堪比話筒: **Call Quality** is equally impressive. Besides stable basic call quality, the microphone pickup is comparable to a dedicated mic, which is truly amazing. In tests with friends, they barely noticed I was using AirPods!
translations.**騎車配戴部分** ，其實我本來很期待能騎車時帶著聽導航，結果已入手1代的朋友:
**Wearing While Riding**  
I originally looked forward to using them for navigation while riding, but a friend who owns the 1st generation said, "No." More than 3/4 of helmets press on the ear during putting on the helmet, making the earphones easy to fall off. I tested this myself and was a bit shocked. I recommend only wearing one earbud when listening to navigation while riding. It's safer to focus on one ear when putting on or taking off the helmet.
translations.**點擊位置在耳機本體上側邊小孔下方：**\n\n: **Click location is below the small hole on the side of the earbud body:**
translations.*p.s 有刻字約需多等一週，不刻字可到101直接買或透過經銷商購買(價格更便宜: *p.s Engraving takes about one extra week. Without engraving, you can buy directly at 101 or through dealers (usually cheaper).*
translations.*p.s. 因為我沒使用過 1代 所以考量入手的點也不會是跟 1代 做比較有什麼: *p.s. Since I have never used the 1st generation, my reasons for getting these won't focus on improvements over the 1st generation (this article will not mention differences from the 1st generation).*
translations.*p.s. 為了要拿到AirPods能馬上用，其實我套子比AirPods先買好😂: *p.s. To use the AirPods right away, I actually bought the case before the AirPods themselves 😂*
translations.*p.s.但好像有 BUG 有時候不會顯示*\n\n: *p.s. But there seems to be a bug where it sometimes doesn't display*
translations.*盒子內是我貼的防塵貼片\n\n: *Inside the box are the dustproof stickers I applied
translations.*請注意，全新的AirPods價格應該不會低於$4500。*\n\n: *Please note, the price of brand new AirPods should not be lower than $4500.*
translations.- AirPods 2 Models: **A2031, A2032**\n\n:
- AirPods 2 Models: **A2031, A2032**

- AirPods 1 Models: **A1523, A1722**

- Production Year: ≥ 2019
translations.1. Battery Display: The genuine product:
1. Battery Display: The genuine product shows battery levels for the left ear, right ear, and case; counterfeit versions only show one.

2. In Bluetooth settings, the genuine product lets you set tap functions for left and right ears; counterfeit only offers disconnect and forget options.

3. The charging case indicator light turns off when connected on genuine products, but stays on for counterfeit ones.
translations.1. The size and shape are similar to wir:
1. The size and shape are similar to wired EarPods, but the issue of falling off:

   First, there is a difference in size and shape compared to EarPods. I find EarPods a bit loose when I wear them, but AirPods feel very secure and don't fall off even when jumping around. However, it really depends on the person; some may experience fit issues. It's recommended to borrow a friend's AirPods to try before buying!

   [**Or stick some artificial leather on the earbud to increase surface area and resistance**](https://applealmond.com/posts/35916){:target="_blank"}

2. Sound quality is similar to EarPods: Actually, there's a big difference. AirPods have much better sound quality. Although they may not match headphones in the same price range that focus on sound quality and lack noise cancellation, AirPods are not designed primarily for sound quality, so it depends on personal preference.  
   From my experience, the sound has noticeable surround layers and a wide range, maintaining a solid overall standard!
translations.1.當 AirPod 電池電量低時，您會在其中一個或兩個 AirPods 中聽到: 1. When the AirPod battery is low, you will hear a chime in one or both AirPods. You will hear one chime when the battery is low, and another chime before the AirPods turn off.
translations.2.如果 AirPods 放在充電盒中而且盒蓋開著，指示燈顯示的是 AirPod: 2. If the AirPods are in the charging case with the lid open, the indicator light shows the AirPods' charging status. If the AirPods are not in the case, the indicator light shows the case's charging status. Green means fully charged, while amber means less than one full charge remains.
translations.4/23 開賣就立馬下標了，AirPods 2 這次可以雷射鐫刻(刻字)當然不免: I placed an order as soon as they went on sale on 4/23. This time, AirPods 2 offer laser engraving (custom text), so of course, I got mine engraved:
translations.> *Please note, the price of brand new A: > *Please note, the price of brand new AirPods should not be lower than $4500.*
translations.> 1. When the AirPod battery is low, you: > 1. When the AirPod battery is low, you will hear a chime in one or both AirPods. You will hear one chime when the battery is low, and another chime before the AirPods turn off.
translations.> 2. If the AirPods are in the charging: > 2. If the AirPods are in the charging case with the lid open, the indicator light shows the AirPods' charging status. If the AirPods are not in the case, the indicator light shows the case's charging status. Green means fully charged, while amber means less than one full charge remains.
translations.> In memory of Swedish legendary music p: > In memory of Swedish legendary music producer AVICII
translations.> There is a BUG where your battery widg: > There is a BUG where your battery widget shows the charge briefly and then disappears; please go to "Settings" -> "Display & Brightness" -> "Text Size" -> reset to the default size (third level) to fix it!
translations.> p.s. The only difference between the w: > p.s. The only difference between the wireless and wired versions is that the wired charging case is the same as the 1st generation (indicator light inside); the wireless charging case has the indicator light outside and can also be charged with a cable.
translations.> “One day you’ll leave this world behin: > “One day you’ll leave this world behind So live a life you will remember.” [Avicii — The Nights](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UtF6Jej8yb4){:target="_blank"}
translations.AirPods 1代推出後，身邊朋友的使用經驗多半好評，這次剛好跟上AirPod: After the launch of AirPods 1st generation, most of my friends had positive experiences using them. This time, I decided to follow the trend and got the AirPods 2nd generation.
translations.AirPods 與其他廠牌的藍牙耳機最大的差異就是小範圍的細節體驗無話可說，像是: The biggest difference between AirPods and other brands of Bluetooth earphones lies in the small-scale detail experience. For example, music automatically pauses when you take one ear off and resumes when you put it back on. You can start using them right away when you take them out, and just put them back when not in use—no need to worry about turning them on/off or connecting. In terms of comfort, you can barely feel they are there when wearing them.
translations.AirPods 這款產品剛出來時，我並沒有特別注意；第一眼看覺得就是個像蓮蓬頭的: When AirPods first came out, I didn’t pay much attention; at first glance, they just looked like wireless Bluetooth earbuds shaped like a showerhead. At that time, the wireless Bluetooth earbud market was very crowded, with every style and need covered, plus the prices weren’t affordable. What was so special about them?
translations.Apple Watch 上電量顯示視窗下方會多顯示AirPods的電量\n\n: The battery display window on the Apple Watch will also show the AirPods' battery level below.
translations.TESTV 評測頻道也有提到它的MacBook Pro在蓋起來外接使用時，搭配A: The TESTV review channel also mentioned that when using their MacBook Pro closed with external devices, the AirPods' signal would cut in and out! (I haven't experienced this part)
translations.p.s. 無線版跟有線版的差別只在，充電盒有線版同1代(指示燈在內)；無線版的充: p.s. The only difference between the wireless and wired versions is that the wired charging case is the same as the 1st generation (indicator light inside); the wireless charging case has the indicator light outside and can also be charged with a cable.
translations.“One day you’ll leave this world behind: “One day you’ll leave this world behind So live a life you will remember.” [Avicii — The Nights](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UtF6Jej8yb4){:target="_blank"}
translations.一切都看似美好，直到我下標收到貨之後，實際使用發現無法同時充手機跟手錶，手錶的充: Everything seemed fine until I placed the order and received the product. When I actually used it, I found that I couldn't charge both my phone and watch at the same time. The watch's battery stayed almost at 0%, and the charging speed was very slow. The current just couldn't keep up! Even using a 5.1V/2.1A charger didn't help. I'm not sure what voltage charger is needed. Checking [user reviews](https://www.facebook.com/gusha.tw/posts/1219673421523621?comment_id=1255505397940423){:target="_blank"}, this issue is not isolated. In the end, I reluctantly returned it.
translations.一句話來總結使用 AirPods 的心得就是：\n\n: One sentence to summarize the experience of using AirPods is:
translations.上拉選單->選擇音訊區塊->選擇右上圖標->切換選擇AirPods\n\n: Swipe up the menu -> select the audio section -> tap the top-right icon -> switch to select AirPods
translations.上滑控制中心->點擊電量\n\n: Swipe up Control Center -> Tap Battery
translations.不太好貼，因為防塵貼是金屬片，盒子本身有磁鐵容易在瞄準的時候就被吸下去\n\n: It's a bit tricky to apply because the dust-proof sticker is a metal piece, and the box itself has magnets that easily pull it off when trying to align it.
translations.不過，為什麼有這些差異？我猜是因為有其他信號干擾（燈、螢幕輸出、其他藍芽設備）吧: However, why are there these differences? I guess it's due to other signal interference (lights, screen output, other Bluetooth devices).
translations.也可由此查看AirPods電量。（顯示電量較低的那隻的電量）\n\n: You can also check the AirPods battery level here. (Displays the battery level of the one with lower charge)
translations.亂開箱結束！整體拿起來有份量，手感跟質感非常好，刻字部分也很精細；是蘋果產品該有: Unboxing complete! The overall weight feels substantial, and the texture and quality are excellent. The engraving is also very detailed—truly the standard you expect from an Apple product!
translations.以後就能直接左滑控制中心查看AirPods電量（顯示電量較低的那隻的電量）要看左: In the future, you can directly swipe left in the Control Center to check your AirPods battery (it shows the battery of the one with lower charge). To see the battery levels of the left ear, right ear, and the case, you need to put one AirPod back into the case and open the case (because the case itself has no Bluetooth function):
translations.以此紀念 瑞典傳奇音樂製作人 AVICII\n\n: In memory of Swedish legendary music producer AVICII
translations.但以上都不確定之後山寨版會不會修正，所以大家還是以官方或大型通路渠道購買較安全．: However, since it is uncertain whether counterfeit versions will be improved in the future, it is safer for everyone to purchase through official or major retail channels.
translations.你無需花心思在那些不必要的事物上，耳機就該只是耳機。\n\n: You don't need to worry about unnecessary things; earphones should just be earphones.
translations.充電盒指示燈正版連上後會熄/盜版會繼續亮著\n: The charging case indicator light turns off when connected for genuine products, but stays on for counterfeit ones.
translations.充電速度飛快，加上放在盒子內就會自動充電；所以只要稍微注意盒子還有沒有電就好(盒: Charging speed is very fast, and it automatically charges when placed in the case; so you just need to keep an eye on the case's battery level (the case can charge about 5 times). You rarely encounter situations where the Bluetooth earphones run out of power and you have to wait for them to charge slowly.
translations.全新AirPods第一次使用時只需打開 AirPods盒子 靠近 iPhone: When using brand new AirPods for the first time, simply open the AirPods case near your iPhone, and a prompt will appear to complete pairing; no need to press any pairing button.
translations.其實我摸索了一下才知道位置\n\n: Actually, I had to explore a bit to find the location.
translations.區分這個的標準不是1或2代，而是有線或無線版；如果您是有線版那1、2代都能用，無: The distinction is not between 1st or 2nd generation, but between wired and wireless versions. If you have the wired version, both 1st and 2nd generations are compatible. The wireless version has the indicator light on the outside and the pairing button positioned higher in the center on the back, so it cannot share cases with the wired version. Please pay attention to this ⚠️
translations.原本在使用的藍牙耳機已服役一段時間，就是款中規中矩的耳機，沒有不好但也沒特別出色: The Bluetooth earphones I was originally using had been in service for a while. They were an average pair—not bad, but nothing special. The sound quality was mediocre, but the battery life was sufficient. The main issues were unclear call quality, signal interference, long presses needed to power on/off, waiting for pairing, and unclear battery indicators—these were minor annoyances. I mainly used them for commuting and exercise, and usually used speakers or wired earphones when at the computer, so they met my basic needs.
translations.另外手機連接速度的確很快但電腦的連接速度：我的MacBook Pro 2018: The connection speed with the phone is indeed very fast, but the connection speed with my MacBook Pro 2018 is quite slow. However, my other Mac Mini connects as fast as the phone.
translations.另外請大家發現山寨的AirPods或蘋果產品不要姑息養奸，無論是來路不明的網站、: Also, if you come across counterfeit AirPods or Apple products, do not tolerate them. Whether from unknown websites, one-page shopping scams, Shopee, or Ruten, be sure to [contact the Consumer Protection Team](https://www.ptt.cc/bbs/iOS/M.1554263108.A.0E4.html){:target="_blank"} to report.
translations.可以刻 **11個字元** ，包含中文/英文/符號/空格；實測符號部分應該大部分: You can engrave **up to 11 characters**, including Chinese, English, symbols, and spaces; most symbols should work based on tests. If unsupported, it will show “These characters cannot be engraved:”, so no need to worry about garbled text.
translations.可自行選擇左右耳的雙擊的動作．\n\n: You can customize the double-tap action for either the left or right earbud.
translations.在寫心得之前，先提一個最近聽到的創業故事；簡而言之就是：「做產品時我們應該要做的: Before sharing my thoughts, let me mention a recent startup story I heard; in short: "When creating a product, we should not target a broad audience but focus on a small niche first, then gradually expand."
translations.如果你不小心下標了，取貨付款請直接拒收、已收請趕快打電話給貨運公司要求退貨（態度: If you accidentally placed an order with cash on delivery, please refuse the package upon delivery. If you have already received it, quickly call the courier company to request a return (be firm). For any issues, you can join [FB Shopping Ad Victims Self-Help Group](https://www.facebook.com/groups/194233504369614/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.官方給的預估收到時間是：5/3~5/10，4/29通知從上海出貨，很幸運地4/3: The official estimated delivery time was 5/3~5/10. On 4/29, I was notified that it shipped from Shanghai. Luckily, I received it on 4/30, just before the Labor Day holiday on May 1st (super fast!! From Shanghai to Taipei).
translations.左上角「」->「系統偏好設定」->「藍芽」(若沒聲音請將聲音書出改選AirPo: Top left corner "" -> "System Preferences" -> "Bluetooth" (If no sound, please adjust the sound output to AirPods)
translations.左滑到控制中心->下方「編輯」->找到「電池」新增並排序\n\n: Swipe left to Control Center -> tap "Edit" at the bottom -> find "Battery" and add it, then arrange the order
translations.底部充電孔有蓋子可開關\n\n: The charging port at the bottom has a cover that can be opened and closed.
translations.延遲就如傳言一樣，看影片、玩遊戲幾乎感覺不到延遲(我測試玩的是極速領域賽車遊戲): The latency is just as rumored—when watching videos or playing games, you can hardly feel any delay (I tested with the racing game Asphalt 9).
translations.從發佈到開賣(台灣)，大約隔了1個月，每天都要照三餐上官網看開賣沒，相信很多網友: From the announcement to the sale (in Taiwan), it took about a month. I checked the official website every meal, every day to see if it was available. I'm sure many others did the same XD; the wait was really nerve-wracking since other countries had already started selling it!
translations.想想也不過就兩條線(AirPods跟iPhone都是lightning/Appl: Thinking about it, there are only two cables anyway (AirPods and iPhone both use Lightning / Apple Watch has its own cable), and wired is still faster; wireless requires that version + the board's cable + possibly a bigger connector? Compared to that, there’s no clear convenience advantage.
translations.手勢可控制的項目太少…我真的很習慣手勢控制大小聲（不過還好這部分有手錶可以控制S: The gesture controls are too limited... I'm really used to adjusting volume with gestures (but luckily, the watch can control Spotify volume).
translations.拿收耳機只需翻開上半部\n\n: To take out the earphones, just open the top half.
translations.日前在Facbook、Google廣告聯播網上發現有惡劣商人，將盜版用接近正版價: Recently, I discovered malicious sellers on Facebook and Google ad networks selling counterfeit products at prices close to the genuine ones (the website is a common [one-page scam site](https://www.facebook.com/ecotcpd/posts/%E5%85%AD%E5%A4%A7%E7%89%B9%E5%BE%B5%E7%A0%B4%E8%A7%A3%E4%B8%80%E9%A0%81%E5%BC%8F%E5%BB%A3%E5%91%8A%E8%A9%90%E9%A8%99%E8%BF%91%E6%9C%9F%E8%87%89%E6%9B%B8line%E5%8F%8A%E5%90%84%E5%A4%A7%E7%B6%B2%E8%B7%AF%E5%B9%B3%E8%87%BA%E4%B8%8A%E5%87%BA%E7%8F%BE%E8%A8%B1%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%80%E9%A0%81%E5%BC%8F%E7%B6%B2%E8%B7%AF%E8%B3%BC%E7%89%A9%E5%BB%A3%E5%91%8A%E5%9B%A0%E7%82%BA%E5%95%86%E5%93%81%E5%83%B9%E6%A0%BC%E6%AF%94%E5%B8%82%E5%83%B9%E4%BD%8E%E4%BA%86%E5%A5%BD%E5%B9%BE%E5%80%8D%E8%A8%B1%E5%A4%9A%E7%B6%B2%E8%B3%BC%E6%97%8F%E5%9B%A0%E8%80%8C%E4%B8%8B%E6%A8%99%E8%B3%BC%E8%B2%B7%E6%94%B6%E5%88%B0%E8%B2%A8%E5%93%81%E5%BE%8C%E6%89%8D%E7%99%BC%E7%8F%BE%E8%88%87%E7%B6%B2%E9%A0%81%E6%89%80%E5%88%8A/1986377751611350/){:target="_blank"}), which is very malicious. If you are trying to save a few bucks by spending around 1000 to buy AirPods, you should be aware that they are fake. Selling counterfeit products at genuine prices is really low-level and unacceptable!
translations.最終還是要說一下我覺得的缺點\n\n: Finally, I have to mention the drawbacks I noticed.
translations.會選擇這個的原因是：防水、防摔、有掛勾、使用便利（拿收耳機跟充電時不用拆）\n\: The reasons for choosing this are: waterproof, drop-resistant, has a hook, and convenient to use (no need to remove when taking out or charging the earphones).
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本來只是單純的iPhone用戶，去年入手了MacBook Pro、 [Apple: Originally just a simple iPhone user, last year I got a MacBook Pro and an [Apple Watch S4](../a2920e33e73e/), starting to fall into the Apple ecosystem (commonly called the Apple family bucket). I had the watch but was missing a pair of earphones.
translations.本體全身照\n\n: Full body shot of the device
translations.正面，因為怕髒所以我買深色\n\n: Front side: I bought the dark color because I was afraid it would get dirty.
translations.沒貼好會有點不密合，我橋很久才讓他完全密合；邊邊稍微有一點點刮手感（不影響，可能: If not applied properly, it won't fit tightly. I spent quite some time to make it fit perfectly; the edges feel slightly rough to the touch (doesn't affect use, possibly due to manufacturing tolerance?).
translations.無線及有線版本價格差$1,200，起初我是考慮買無線版本的；想到我那凌亂的床頭櫃: The price difference between the wireless and wired versions is $1,200. At first, I was considering the wireless version; thinking about the messy charging cables on my bedside table and how I could carry one less cable when traveling abroad really tempted me with the convenience!
translations.由於在下奶油手，AirPods就跟一顆雞蛋ㄧ樣，我很怕會溜手直接摔爆；爬了許多保: Because I have very slippery hands, AirPods feel like a fragile egg to me, and I'm afraid they'll slip and break easily; after reading many protective case recommendations, quite a few people recommend this one: Catalyst AirPods Waterproof Carrying Case (Protective Cover)
translations.目前主要的識別方式是從軟體下手：\n\n: The main identification method currently focuses on software:
translations.目前覺得有點多餘，不知道使用一陣子後的效果如何，所以先持保留態度。\n\n: Currently feels a bit unnecessary; unsure about the effect after using it for a while, so remaining cautious for now.
translations.直到我真正上手後才感受到它的 **「驚艷」** 之處，自從開賣之後 AirPod: I only truly felt its **"wow"** factor after using it myself. Since its launch, AirPods have consistently ranked among the top-selling Bluetooth earphones, and this success is not just due to Apple fans' loyalty. So what makes it so good? Let's keep reading.
translations.看到這類廣告請直接點右上角向Facebook/Google檢舉、或是狂點廣告讓他: If you see ads like this, please click the report button at the top right corner to report to Facebook/Google, or click the ads repeatedly to quickly burn through their ad budget.
translations.背面也有相對應配對鍵的按鈕\n\n: There is also a corresponding pairing button on the back.
translations.藍牙設定那邊，正版可以設定左右耳的點擊功能/盜版只有斷開和遺忘\n: In the Bluetooth settings, the genuine product allows you to set tap functions for the left and right ear; the counterfeit only offers disconnect and forget options.
translations.蘋果宣告 AirPower 胎死腹中後，我在網路尋找類似的產品，買了款 2合1的: After Apple announced the cancellation of AirPower, I searched online for similar products and bought a 2-in-1 wireless charger for iPhone and Apple Watch. Since iPhone and AirPods don't usually need charging at the same time, alternating their use allows it to function as a 3-in-1 charger.
translations.詐騙、來源不明的賣家\n\n: Scams and Sellers from Unknown Sources
translations.詳細1、2代比較請參考這篇： [AirPods 第一代與第二代辨識技巧大公開，透: For a detailed comparison between the 1st and 2nd generation, please refer to this article: [AirPods 第一代與第二代辨識技巧大公開，透過這5 招馬上區分出來](https://mrmad.com.tw/identify-your-airpods){:target="_blank"}
translations.請大家要特別注意，對岸已經出現破解晶片的高仿版本，配對同樣有動畫、同樣有電量顯示: Please be especially careful, as counterfeit versions with cracked chips have appeared from the mainland. They have the same pairing animation and battery display, making them almost indistinguishable from the original by appearance.
translations.這裡有一個BUG，如果你的電池小工具顯示電量一下之後就消失；請去「設定」->「螢: There is a BUG where your battery widget shows the charge briefly and then disappears; please go to "Settings" -> "Display & Brightness" -> "Text Size" -> reset to the default size (third level) to fix it!
translations.電量顯示：正版能顯示左耳、右耳、盒子三個電量/盜版只有ㄧ個\n: Battery Display: The genuine product shows battery levels for the left ear, right ear, and case; counterfeit versions only show one.
translations.音質跟earpods很像：同上，其實差很多，AirPods的音質好很多；我覺得雖:
Sound quality is similar to EarPods: Actually, there's a big difference. AirPods have much better sound quality. Although they may not match headphones in the same price range that focus on sound quality and lack noise cancellation, AirPods are not designed primarily for sound quality, so it depends on personal preference.  
From my experience, the sound has noticeable surround layers and a wide range, maintaining a solid overall standard!
